# scc_proxy_settings (Resource)

Cloud Connector Proxy Settings Resource.

__Tips:__
* You must be assigned to the following roles:
	* Administrator

__Further documentation:__
<https://help.sap.com/docs/connectivity/sap-btp-connectivity-cf/proxy-settings>



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host` (String) The name of the proxy host.
- `port` (Number) The port of the proxy host.

### Optional

- `password` (String, Sensitive) The password for the proxy authentication.
- `user` (String) The username for the proxy authentication.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the proxy settings resource. Used for import and identity purposes. The value is always `proxy-settings`.
